entries.name: Keep King Oleb's favour & the letter of marque
entries.note: Patron bond; favour strong (opener delivered, tithe paid). Lose it → lose the marque & Drinax.

entries.name: Make the Harrier pay — raid, trade, survive the month
entries.note: Pirate income vs ~Cr2,657/mo upkeep + 10% tithe; war chest ~Cr1.0M but only shrinking lately.

entries.name: Restore (or seize) the Kingdom of Drinax — the long game
entries.note: The Dragon Throne / new-kingdom victory track; the whole campaign's end.

entries.name: Stay ahead of the Imperial Navy's attention (Heat)
entries.note: Imperial Heat clock → at 5 boxes the Navy sweep (06 Game of Sun & Shadow) goes live.

entries.name: Read the Aslan ihatei tide — threat or opportunity?
entries.note: Masterless second-sons massing on the border; invasion (03 Ihatei!) or opportunity.

entries.name: (Shake) The long way home — crown & riches, or lose himself?
entries.note: Chase the crown & riches and return to brother Akhil, or lose himself out here. Emotional anchor.

entries.name: (Shake) The outsider earning a place in a kingdom not his own
entries.note: An Imperial nobody earning standing in a kingdom that isn't his.

entries.name: The lost crown jewels of Sindal (Borite painting lead)
entries.note: Borite painting points at the Eagle of Sol, Thalassan Pearl, diamond rings of Kether — treasure lead.

entries.name: Darokyn's secret — Imperial Intel, proof on his flagship
entries.note: Crew alone know Admiral Darokyn is Imperial Naval Intelligence deep-cover; proof on his flagship — dormant blackmail/heist leverage.

entries.name: Phase 2 — build the New Kingdom (raid, court, grow Fighting Strength)
entries.note: Raid lanes, court/recruit independent Reach worlds, grow Fighting Strength toward a restored Drinax.

entries.name: Honour the Clarke pact — defend Clarke → Haven
entries.note: Actually defend Clarke from raiders → deepens to Haven; fail/break → lose Clarke.

entries.name: The GeDeCo rivalry
entries.note: Megacorp rival empire-builder; beaten 3× (Torpol, Clarke, Paal); overdue a hard counter; likely a court spy.

entries.name: The corsair warlord massing to sack Pourne
entries.note: Rival uniting raider bands to sack Pourne; danger + the key to winning Pourne if broken. No hard intel yet (Krrsh came up blank).
